title: picea acutissima
intro: Picea acutissima, also known as the black spruce or Chinese spruce, is a species of evergreen tree native to China. The bark and needles of this plant have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Picea acutissima include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Picea acutissima include tea infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory and cardiovascular issues.
